The platform works well, but there is one issue that needs improvement. When placing an order, the TP (Take Profit) and SL (Stop Loss) are not set automatically, and it becomes difficult to add them manually from the position panel. It would be very helpful if you could introduce a drag-and-drop feature for TP and SL directly on the chart. This feature would make trading much faster and easier, not only for me but for many other users as well. Please consider adding this in a future update.

Groww trading app gives very misleading notifications. When the market goes up, it sends notifications suggesting PUT, and when the market goes down, it sends CALL notifications. This confuses traders and can cause losses. It feels like the app is misleading investors and putting their money at risk. Very disappointing

I faced a serious issue while trading in the F&O section today. I had almost recovered my loss and only around ₹800 was left. When I refreshed the Groww app, my order got executed automatically and my loss suddenly increased again. This created confusion during live trading. I request the team to check this issue and improve app stability, order execution clarity, and real-time updates so traders do not face such problems in fast market conditions. waste app 😡
